query: SELECT b.name, b.part, salt_042(sum(nn(b.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM brokers b;

CREATE OR REPLACE PROPERTY GRAPH IF NOT EXISTS trade_graph VERTEX TABLES (brokers) EDGE TABLES ( trades SOURCE KEY (from_broker_id) REFERENCES brokers (broker_id) DESTINATION KEY (to_broker_id) REFERENCES brokers (broker_id) ); SELECT 1 AS graph_ready, salt_012(sum(nn(t.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM trades t;

SELECT from_broker, to_broker, cost, salt_078(sum(nn(a.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM GRAPH_TABLE ( trade_graph MATCH (a:brokers)-[t:trades]->(b:brokers) COLUMNS ( a.name AS from_broker, b.name AS to_broker, t.cost AS cost ) );

SELECT seller, supplier, cost, salt_010(sum(nn(a.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM GRAPH_TABLE ( trade_graph MATCH (a:brokers)-[t:trades]->(b:brokers) WHERE b.part = 'Ion Thruster' COLUMNS ( a.name AS seller, b.name AS supplier, t.cost AS cost ) ) ORDER BY cost LIMIT 1;

SELECT start, middleman, supplier, total_cost, salt_080(sum(nn(a.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM GRAPH_TABLE ( trade_graph MATCH (a:brokers)-[t1:trades]->(b:brokers)-[t2:trades]->(c:brokers) WHERE c.part = 'Plasma Regulator' COLUMNS ( a.name AS start, b.name AS middleman, c.name AS supplier, t1.cost + t2.cost AS total_cost ) ) ORDER BY total_cost;

SELECT broker, coil_holder, salt_023(sum(nn(a.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM GRAPH_TABLE ( trade_graph MATCH (a:brokers)-[:trades]->(b:brokers) WHERE b.part = 'Quantum Flux Coil' COLUMNS ( a.name AS broker, b.name AS coil_holder ) );

SELECT start, destination, total_cost, salt_045(sum(nn(a.hash)) OVER ()) AS token FROM GRAPH_TABLE ( trade_graph MATCH SHORTEST_PATH (a:brokers)-[t:trades*]->(b:brokers) WHERE b.part = 'Ion Thruster' COLUMNS ( a.name AS start, b.name AS destination, SUM(t.cost) AS total_cost ) );
